heading: Contravention of State laws
label: 347b Contravention of State laws
text: Nothing in this Act shall be construed as authorizing the possession, sale, or serving of colored oleomargarine or colored margarine in any State or Territory in contravention of the laws of such State or Territory.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified to sections 331, 342, 347 to 347b of this title, and sections 45 and 55 of Title 15, Commerce and Trade. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Mar. 16, 1950, ch. 6164 Stat. 20
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act which comprises this chapter.
